rationale: Review 2 more completely and precisely diagnoses the core generality failures: general categorical facts (BialgHom antipode preservation, TensorProduct map_id/comp) buried as `private` in a base-change file where they can't be reused, plus multiple `@[simp]` lemmas that duplicate Mathlib's more general versions at a strictly less general level—all confirmed against the diff. Review 1 catches a narrow slice of the same problem (map_comp duplication) but misses the broader pattern and the most impactful fix (making the private general lemmas public or moving them).
